positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain range at sunset. The scene features clean, jagged silhouettes of peaks against a dramatic, gradient sky painted in deep indigo, fiery orange, and soft rose gold. Include subtle, abstract elements like geometric constellations or flying wispy vapor trails to enhance the magical, ethereal quality. The overall composition must be centrally focused and high-contrast, perfect for a screen print on apparel. Flat graphic design aesthetic with deep shadow and vibrant, saturated colors. Clean edges, symmetrical composition, vector art feel, cinematic lighting, high detail, perfect for commercial merchandise.
negative: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, signature, logos, dirty, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cluttered, realism, photo-realistic, bokeh
